name_en: Style No.666234 🏒MCM🏒 Original Patricia Crossbody Bag, made of classic Visetos, stylish and chic. The front flap laurel lock design showcases classic charm. Three internal compartments keep your items organized. Removable shoulder strap allows for both handbag and crossbody wear, freeing your hands. Dimensions: 12.5x18x9cm
